description: SEC Form 8-K skeleton transfer fixture from Driven Brands Holdings Inc. Item 4.02 filing. Skeleton only: cover-page filing identity, registrant, identifiers, item headings, exhibit table, and signature block.
notes: The source preserves two distinct commission-file-number values: a header value and a registrant-cover-page value.
